title: WooCommerce Rebuild: 67% Conversion Lift & 92 Lighthouse Score
summary: Led a full WooCommerce store rebuild on WordPress — improving performance, checkout UX, and conversion through plugin optimisation and mobile-first design.
challenge: The legacy WooCommerce store ran on an outdated theme with 3.2s mobile load time, broken plugin conflicts, and a 1.2% conversion rate. Checkout abandonment exceeded 78%, and there was no reliable analytics tracking.
strategy: Rebuilt on a lightweight WooCommerce theme with a curated plugin stack. Prioritised performance and mobile UX first, then layered CRO improvements on PDP and checkout before integrating GA4 tracking for ongoing optimisation.
implementation: Migrated to a performance-optimised WooCommerce theme with lazy-loaded images
Consolidated plugin stack: Yoast SEO, WooCommerce Payments, Klaviyo, Hotjar
Redesigned PDP with trust badges, delivery estimates, and sticky add-to-cart on mobile
Simplified checkout to 2 steps with PayPal, Stripe, and Apple Pay
Deployed GA4 + GTM with validated purchase, add-to-cart, and checkout events

coverScreenshot.caption: WooCommerce storefront & Lighthouse performance
coverScreenshot.capture: Rebuilt WooCommerce homepage on mobile width plus PageSpeed/Lighthouse score (~92 mobile) or GTmetrix result. Include PDP with trust badges if possible.
